narrative:
Union County has 48,212 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.4 percentage points. Millennials are the largest generational cohort at 28.3% of registrants.
